BatchModifyTargetWeight.document: This example shows you how to modify the weight of the RS ins-19404pl5 (port 110) bound to the forwarding rule loc-o8cnyw6c under the listener lbl-4b5hnc9a to 50 and modify the weight of the RS ins-19411tzv (port 80) bound to the forwarding rule loc-8c5pdrb8 under the listener lbl-20jjtaaw to 30 for the CLB instance (lb-dx98lwo0).
BatchModifyTargetWeight.title: Modifying RS Weights in Batches

BatchModifyTargetWeight.document: This example shows you how to modify the weights of servers bound to both layer-4 and layer-7 listeners of a CLB instance.
BatchModifyTargetWeight.title: Modifying Weights of Servers Bound to Layer-4 and Layer-7 Listeners in Batches

POST / HTTP/1.1

}
CloneLoadBalancer.title: Cloning a Cloud Load Balancer

CreateLoadBalancer.document: This example shows you how to create a public network CLB instance in a VPC.
CreateLoadBalancer.input:
POST / HTTP/1.1
Host: clb.tencentcloudapi.com
Content-Type: application/json
X-TC-Action: CreateLoadBalancer
<Common request parameters>

{
    "Forward": 1,
    "ProjectId": 0,
    "LoadBalancerType": "OPEN",
    "VpcId": "vpc-30xqxt9p",
    "LoadBalancerName": "test-open"
}
CreateLoadBalancer.title: Creating a Public Network CLB Instance

CreateLoadBalancer.document: This example shows you how to create a private network CLB instance in a VPC.
CreateLoadBalancer.input:
POST / HTTP/1.1
Host: clb.tencentcloudapi.com
Content-Type: application/json
X-TC-Action: CreateLoadBalancer
<Common request parameters>

{
    "Forward": "1",
    "SubnetId": "subnet-k57djpow",
    "LoadBalancerType": "INTERNAL",
    "VpcId": "vpc-30xqxt9p",
    "LoadBalancerName": "test_internal"
}
CreateLoadBalancer.title: Creating a Private Network CLB Instance
